framework.name: Relevance Premium Over Seniority Premium
framework.description: Current, hard-to-find expertise on specific topic (e.g., OTT streaming implementation) commands higher rates than generic senior experience. Client example: would pay $800/hour for current VP at target company over $300/hour for retired C-suite with outdated tangential experience.
framework.raw_quote: If the consulting topic is on a company or topic where you have deep, current and hard-to-find expertise, this trumps everything. If we can present you to clients as a top expert with specialized knowledge, they will gladly pay rates much higher than your current seniority would indicate.

source.title: Setting Your Expert Network Consulting Rate • Expert Opportunities
